input.prompt: Objective: Show the bad setup through a visible action. Subject: The visible environment and objects around the Ellie Lamps - HTTYD – Elie crafts problem. Start frame: The shot starts on the messy starting setup related to Ellie Lamps - HTTYD – Elie crafts, with clutter, poor placement, or unfinished surroundings visible. Action: A hand moves the wrong item into the setup, nudges clutter aside, and exposes the problem instead of fixing it. Camera: handheld push-in. Lighting: Harsh overhead light creates uneven shadows and makes the clutter easy to read. End frame: The shot ends with the messy setup still visible and more crowded than the first frame. Continuity: Begins the sequence and leaves the bad setup visible for Scene 2.
